evidence: frontmatter name: workflow-producer; parent directory basename: 工作流导演
description: Frontmatter name does not match parent directory name, violating the open Agent Skills spec MUST rule; mirrored in .claude/ and plugins/writing-agent/ copies
suggested_fix: Rename directory to workflow-producer, or set name: 工作流导演 if non-ASCII names are acceptable to the target tooling

evidence: frontmatter name: style-modeler; parent directory basename: 风格建模
description: Frontmatter name does not match parent directory name, violating the open Agent Skills spec MUST rule; mirrored in .claude/ and plugins/writing-agent/ copies
suggested_fix: Rename directory to style-modeler, or set name: 风格建模 if non-ASCII names are acceptable to the target tooling

evidence: frontmatter name: web-article-extractor; parent directory basename: 公众号文章获取
description: Frontmatter name does not match parent directory name, violating the open Agent Skills spec MUST rule; mirrored in .claude/ and plugins/writing-agent/ copies
suggested_fix: Rename directory to web-article-extractor, or set name: 公众号文章获取 if non-ASCII names are acceptable to the target tooling

evidence: return eval(scriptContent); where scriptContent = fs.readFileSync(path.join(SKILL_PATH, 'readability_extractor.js')) and SKILL_PATH is overridable via globalThis.__WEB_ARTICLE_EXTRACTOR_PATH__ (lines 15-17)
description: eval() executes file content whose path is derived from an overridable global; currently unreachable since nothing in-repo sets that global, but the primitive is a real arbitrary-file-read-into-eval if any caller ever does
suggested_fix: Remove eval(); require the extractor module directly or use dynamic import(), and drop the globalThis path override

evidence: script.src = 'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@mozilla/readability@0.6.0/Readability-readerable.min.js' injected via document.createElement('script')
description: CDN fallback dynamically loads and executes remote JS with no Subresource Integrity hash; version is pinned which mitigates but does not eliminate supply-chain risk
suggested_fix: Add integrity/crossorigin attributes, or prefer the already-vendored local scripts/Readability.js instead of a CDN fetch

evidence: script.src = 'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/turndown@7.1.3/dist/turndown.min.js' injected via document.createElement('script')
description: Same CDN script-injection pattern for turndown@7.1.3 and (line 34) @mozilla/readability@0.5.0, no SRI hash; a vendored Readability.js already exists in the same directory and is not reused here
suggested_fix: Add SRI hashes, or bundle turndown locally and reuse scripts/Readability.js instead of fetching from CDN at runtime

evidence: const apiKey = process.env.GEMINI_API_KEY || process.env.THIRD_PARTY_API_KEY; used to call an external image-generation API via fetch (lines 80-85)
description: Sends user prompts to an external image-generation endpoint using an API key read from env; this is the tool's documented, intended feature, flagged per rubric pattern for completeness rather than as a defect
suggested_fix: No functional change needed; consider scrubbing API responses before logging them in the catch block (line 131) in case an upstream error payload ever echoes the key

evidence: protocol.get(url, ...) where url comes from image.src extracted from arbitrary scraped web pages, downloaded to local disk
description: Downloads every image URL found on an extracted page via raw http/https.get; a 30s timeout already exists but there is no max response size cap
suggested_fix: Add a byte-size cap alongside the existing request timeout, and explicitly restrict to http/https protocols

evidence: grep for <example> across .claude/agents/*.md returns zero matches in any of the 20 files
description: Agent frontmatter/description has zero <example> blocks demonstrating invocation
suggested_fix: Add at least one <example> block to the description per the agent frontmatter convention

evidence: 'Glob' appears exactly once in the file (the tools: frontmatter line); zero body references
description: Glob is declared in tools: but never used in the agent body
suggested_fix: Remove Glob from the tools list, or add a step that actually uses glob-style file discovery

evidence: body invokes image generation via Bash: npx tsx scripts/generate_image.ts (line 95), never through a tool literally named GenerateImage
description: GenerateImage is declared in tools: but the actual mechanism used in the body is a Bash script call, not the declared tool
suggested_fix: Either remove GenerateImage from tools: (since Bash already covers the script invocation), or clarify that GenerateImage is an alias the runtime maps to this script

evidence: Subagent 清单 table lists 19 rows (topic-generator through edit-diff-learner); memory-loader is absent from the table despite being described in prose as the Stage-0 agent and being stage id "0" in .claude/workflows/collab_v2.json
description: The subagent roster table at the end of the workflow-producer SKILL.md omits memory-loader, which is otherwise an active, wired-in Stage-0 subagent
suggested_fix: Add a memory-loader row to the Subagent 清单 table (用途: 装载历史写作偏好; 调用时机: Stage 0, 紧随 Stage 1 之后)
